text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 6 

ACUTE_STAYS 

LABEL: Acute Inpatient Stays 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of acute inpatient hospital stays (unique admissions, which may span more 
than one facility) for the year. An acute inpatient stay is defined as a set of one or more consecutive 
acute inpatient hospital claims where the beneficiary is only discharged on the most recent claim in the 
set. If a
